metadata.description: Challenges validating documentation completeness including CODE_OF_CONDUCT presence, format guide coverage for all 17 formats, video course script presence, website page functionality, CHANGELOG currency, architecture diagram accuracy, KMP module documentation, legacy migration guide, and challenge framework documentation

challenges.name: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md Exists and Is Complete
challenges.description: Verify that CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md exists in the project root, contains substantive content (not a placeholder), includes sections for expected behavior, unacceptable behavior, enforcement responsibilities, and contact information. The file must be at least 50 lines long and reference either the Contributor Covenant or a custom code of conduct.

outputs.name: file_exists
outputs.description: Whether CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md exists in the project root

outputs.name: line_count
outputs.description: Number of lines in CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md

outputs.name: required_sections
outputs.description: Map of required section names to their presence status

outputs.name: missing_sections
outputs.description: Required sections that are missing from the document

assertions.message: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md must exist in the project root
CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md must be at least 50 lines long
All required sections must be present in CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md

challenges.name: Format Guides Present for All 17 Formats
challenges.description: Verify that documentation exists for each of the 17 supported text formats: Markdown, TodoTxt, CSV, LaTeX, OrgMode, Plaintext, Wikitext, AsciiDoc, reStructuredText, R Markdown, TaskPaper, Textile, Creole, TiddlyWiki, Jupyter, KeyValue, and Binary. Each format guide must describe the syntax supported, parsing behavior, known limitations, and example documents.

outputs.name: format_guides
outputs.description: Map of format name to guide file path and content status

outputs.name: missing_guides
outputs.description: Formats without documentation guides

outputs.name: incomplete_guides
outputs.description: Guides missing required sections (syntax, parsing, limitations, examples)

outputs.name: formats_documented
outputs.description: Number of formats with complete documentation

assertions.message: All 17 formats must have documentation guides
All format guides must include syntax, parsing, limitations, and examples sections
All 17 formats must be fully documented

challenges.name: Video Course Scripts Present
challenges.description: Verify that all 19 video course scripts exist and contain up-to-date content. Scripts must reference correct test counts (9,400+), correct format counts (17), and correct module counts (10 extracted KMP modules). No script may reference non-existent formats or outdated architecture descriptions.

outputs.name: script_files
outputs.description: List of video course script files found

outputs.name: missing_scripts
outputs.description: Expected scripts that are missing

outputs.name: stale_references
outputs.description: Scripts containing outdated counts or non-existent format references

outputs.name: scripts_found
outputs.description: Number of script files found

assertions.message: All 19 video course scripts must be present
No expected video course scripts may be missing
No scripts may contain outdated references or stale counts

challenges.name: Website Pages Present and Functional
challenges.description: Verify that all 11 website pages exist, contain valid HTML/Markdown, do not reference non-existent formats or features, and have consistent navigation links. Each page must be non-empty, have a title, and link back to the main index. Verify that metrics and feature lists on website pages match the current project state.

outputs.name: page_files
outputs.description: List of website page files found with their validation status

outputs.name: missing_pages
outputs.description: Expected website pages that are missing

outputs.name: broken_links
outputs.description: Internal navigation links that point to non-existent pages

outputs.name: stale_content
outputs.description: Pages with outdated metrics or non-existent feature references

outputs.name: pages_found
outputs.description: Number of website pages found

assertions.message: All 11 website pages must be present
No expected website pages may be missing
No internal navigation links may be broken
No pages may contain stale metrics or non-existent feature references

challenges.name: CHANGELOG Current with Recent Changes
challenges.description: Verify that CHANGELOG.md (or equivalent) exists and includes entries for the most recent development session. The changelog must follow a consistent format (Keep a Changelog or similar), include dates, and cover major changes from the last 3 development sessions. The most recent entry must not be older than 30 days from the current date.

outputs.name: changelog_exists
outputs.description: Whether CHANGELOG.md exists

outputs.name: most_recent_date
outputs.description: Date of the most recent changelog entry

outputs.name: staleness_days
outputs.description: Number of days since the most recent changelog entry

outputs.name: entries_count
outputs.description: Total number of changelog entries

outputs.name: format_consistent
outputs.description: Whether the changelog follows a consistent format

assertions.message: CHANGELOG.md must exist in the project
CHANGELOG must follow a consistent format with dates
Most recent changelog entry must have a valid date

challenges.name: Architecture Diagrams Up to Date
challenges.description: Verify that architecture diagrams exist and reflect the current system state. Diagrams must include the 10 extracted KMP modules, the shared module structure, platform source sets, the text parsing pipeline, the network protocol layer with resilience patterns, and the composite build topology. At least 8 architecture diagrams must be present.

outputs.name: diagram_files
outputs.description: List of architecture diagram files found

outputs.name: missing_diagrams
outputs.description: Expected diagrams that are missing

outputs.name: outdated_diagrams
outputs.description: Diagrams that reference outdated module counts or missing components

outputs.name: diagrams_found
outputs.description: Number of architecture diagrams found

assertions.message: At least 8 architecture diagrams must be present
No expected architecture diagrams may be missing
No diagrams may reference outdated module counts or missing components

challenges.name: KMP Module Documentation Complete
challenges.description: Verify that each of the 10 extracted KMP modules has CHANGELOG.md and CONTRIBUTING.md files. Each CHANGELOG must have at least one version entry. Each CONTRIBUTING must describe the build process, testing approach, and code style. Modules: RateLimiter-KMP, Concurrency-KMP, UI-Components-KMP, Auth-KMP, Security-KMP, Document-KMP, Config-KMP, Database-KMP, Storage-KMP, Formatters-KMP.

outputs.name: module_docs
outputs.description: Map of module name to documentation file presence and completeness

outputs.name: missing_changelogs
outputs.description: Modules missing CHANGELOG.md

outputs.name: missing_contributing
outputs.description: Modules missing CONTRIBUTING.md

outputs.name: incomplete_docs
outputs.description: Modules with incomplete documentation (missing required sections)

outputs.name: modules_checked
outputs.description: Number of KMP modules checked

assertions.message: All 10 KMP modules must be checked for documentation
All KMP modules must have CHANGELOG.md
All KMP modules must have CONTRIBUTING.md
All module documentation must be complete with required sections

challenges.name: Legacy Migration Guide Present
challenges.description: Verify that LEGACY_MIGRATION.md exists and documents the migration path from legacy Android-only modules (commons/, core/) to the KMP shared module architecture. The guide must include audit results, migration status per module, facade bridge documentation, and instructions for migrating remaining legacy code.

outputs.name: file_exists
outputs.description: Whether LEGACY_MIGRATION.md exists

outputs.name: required_sections
outputs.description: Map of required section names to their presence status

outputs.name: missing_sections
outputs.description: Required sections missing from the migration guide

outputs.name: line_count
outputs.description: Number of lines in the migration guide

assertions.message: LEGACY_MIGRATION.md must exist in the project
All required sections must be present (audit results, migration status, facade bridges, instructions)
LEGACY_MIGRATION.md must be at least 30 lines with substantive content

challenges.name: Challenge Framework Documentation Present
challenges.description: Verify that CHALLENGE_FRAMEWORK.md exists and documents the challenge framework integration including the CI workflow (challenges.yml), Gradle task (runChallenges), challenge bank structure, how to add new challenge banks, and how to run challenges locally. The document must reference the three session-2 challenge banks plus any additional banks added in session-3.

outputs.name: file_exists
outputs.description: Whether CHALLENGE_FRAMEWORK.md exists

outputs.name: required_sections
outputs.description: Map of required section names to presence status

outputs.name: missing_sections
outputs.description: Required sections that are missing

outputs.name: banks_referenced
outputs.description: Number of challenge banks referenced in the document

assertions.message: CHALLENGE_FRAMEWORK.md must exist in the project
All required sections must be present (CI workflow, Gradle task, bank structure, adding banks, local execution)
At least 3 challenge banks must be referenced in the documentation

challenges.name: CLAUDE.md Accuracy and Currency
challenges.description: Verify that CLAUDE.md in the project root accurately reflects the current project state. Check that the format count (17), KMP module count (10), test count (9,400+), platform list (Android, Desktop, iOS, Web), and key file paths all match the actual codebase. The document must not reference files that do not exist or features that have been removed.

outputs.name: accuracy_results
outputs.description: Map of verified claims to their accuracy status

outputs.name: inaccurate_claims
outputs.description: Claims in CLAUDE.md that do not match the actual codebase

outputs.name: missing_file_refs
outputs.description: File paths referenced in CLAUDE.md that do not exist

outputs.name: claims_verified
outputs.description: Total number of claims verified

assertions.message: All claims in CLAUDE.md must accurately reflect the current codebase
All file paths in CLAUDE.md must reference existing files
At least 10 factual claims must be verified against the codebase

challenges.name: SPDX License Headers Present in Source Files
challenges.description: Verify that all Kotlin source files in shared/src contain SPDX license headers as specified in the code conventions (Apache-2.0, CC0-1.0, or Unlicense). Sample at least 50 source files across commonMain, androidMain, desktopMain, iosMain, and wasmJsMain. Each sampled file must have a license header in the first 5 lines.

outputs.name: header_results
outputs.description: Map of sampled file to license header status

outputs.name: missing_headers
outputs.description: Files missing SPDX license headers

outputs.name: invalid_licenses
outputs.description: Files with license identifiers not in the approved list

outputs.name: files_sampled
outputs.description: Number of files sampled

assertions.message: All source files must have SPDX license headers
All license identifiers must be from the approved list (Apache-2.0, CC0-1.0, Unlicense)
At least 50 source files must be sampled across all source sets
